project_type: CDK C# (.NET 8) Infrastructure as Code project with Python Lambda
build_system: dotnet (MSBuild) + CDK CLI (npx cdk). NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for tests to pass: NODE_OPTIONS="" before dotnet test and npx cdk commands
test_framework: xUnit with Amazon.CDK.Assertions. Tests verify synthesized CloudFormation templates.
verification_instructions: 1. Run dotnet restore, 2. Run dotnet build, 3. Run dotnet test (all 70+ tests must pass), 4. Run npx cdk synth (must succeed)
setup_instructions: dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln && NODE_OPTIONS="" dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln --no-restore
environment_constraints: NODE_OPTIONS env var must be unset/cleared for JSII runtime to work (proxy-bootstrap.js conflict). Use NODE_OPTIONS="" prefix on all dotnet test and npx cdk commands. Network mode is COMMON_DEPENDENCIES - package registry access available.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then implement. Use conventional commits. Update ARCHITECTURE.md after changes. Follow least-privilege IAM principles.
key_patterns: Tests create App/Stack/Template and use template.FindResources/HasResourceProperties with serialized JSON assertions. CDK stack defines all AWS resources. Lambda handler at src/CdkBase/lambda/process_audio/index.py. Output bucket currently not assigned to a variable or passed to Lambda.
directory_structure: Root: cdk.json, src/CdkBase/ (CDK stack code + lambda/), src/CdkBase.Tests/ (xUnit tests), docs/ (architecture + guidelines), .github/workflows/ci.yml
